compiled_state.title: test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh: flaky test produces intermittent failures unrelated to code changes
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh fails intermittently in the full test suite. Verified pre-existing: failure reproduces on main branch with changes stashed.

## Steps to Reproduce
Run the full test suite via validate.sh --ci.

## Expected Behavior
test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh should pass consistently.

## Actual Behavior
Intermittent failure, independent of code changes.

## Notes
Pre-existing flaky test.
